function.name: package_manager
function.description: Manage drakeify packages (plugins and tools). Can list installed packages, search the registry, install packages, and remove packages.

action.description: The action to perform: 'list' shows installed packages, 'search' finds packages in registry, 'install' installs a package, 'remove' uninstalls a package

name.description: Package name (required for install and remove actions)

query.description: Search query (required for search action, use '*' to list all packages)
